title: Jazz On The Rooftop – Tuesdays at Virtue
location: Virtue Rooftop (above 5Church Midtown), 84 5th St NW, Atlanta, GA
price: Free to attend / drinks and dinner extra
description: Weekly jazz night on one of Atlanta's most scenic rooftops. Head up after 5PM for live saxophone and city skyline views. Start with dinner at 5Church below for a perfect couple's night out. Weather-dependent.

title: LatinWednesdays at Tongue & Groove
location: Tongue & Groove, 565 Main St NE, Atlanta, GA
description: Atlanta's top Wednesday Latin dance night with rotating DJs playing salsa, bachata, merengue, reggaeton. Dance lesson included early in the night. Great couples energy — full bar, late night, no pressure to be a pro.

title: Breakaway Music Festival 2026 – Day 1
description: Two-day music festival featuring major acts across multiple stages. Huge date energy — bring a blanket, grab drinks, and catch live performances. Check lineup before buying. Outdoor festival vibes with food vendors on site.

title: Breakaway Music Festival 2026 – Day 2
description: Second day of Atlanta's biggest music festival. Bring sunscreen, snacks, and good shoes. Great couple's festival experience if you're into live music and outdoor party vibes. Check lineup and book early.

title: Brit Floyd – The Moon, The Wall, and Beyond
location: Cobb Energy Centre, 755755 Cobb International Blvd, Kennesaw, GA
description: The world's premier Pink Floyd tribute show returns with stunning visuals, lights, and musicianship. An incredible live music experience — perfect for couples who love classic rock, dramatic performances, and an elegant venue night out.

title: Bill Burr – Live at The Tabernacle
location: The Tabernacle, 152 Luckie St NW, Atlanta, GA
description: Bill Burr — Emmy-nominated comedian (Breaking Bad, Friday Night Lights) — brings his no-holds-barred stand-up to Atlanta. The Tabernacle is a legendary music venue that makes for an intimate, electric date night. Get tickets early.

title: TUMBAO Dance Social – Free Monthly
description: Atlanta's beloved monthly salsa social dance night — FREE admission. Lessons early, then open dancing. All levels welcome. Always a great crowd. One of the best free date nights in the city if you're into dancing or want to learn.

title: Like Glue Fridays – Afrobeat & Dancehall Party
description: Atlanta's recurring Friday night Afrobeat and dancehall party with rotating DJs. High energy, full bar, dancing until 2AM. Great couples night if you love to move. Check Eventbrite for venue details and tickets.

title: Reggae Fest Massive ATL – Mavado, Beenie Man, Spice
location: State Farm Arena, 1 State Farm Dr, Atlanta, GA
description: Massive reggae and dancehall lineup featuring Mavado, Busy Signal, Beenie Man, Spice, Elephant Man, and more. One of the biggest reggae events in the Southeast — arena energy, incredible live performances. Book early, it's a big one.

title: R.A.S. Memorial Weekend – 100% Reggae Afrobeat Soca
description: Memorial Weekend celebration with 100% reggae, Afrobeat, and soca music. A cultural weekend event for the community — great couple's vibes if you're into Caribbean music and culture. Check AllEvents for venue and details.

title: AfroPianoWednesdays ATL – DJ Shine D'Beast
description: Atlanta's go-to Afrobeat and piano-infused DJ night featuring DJ Shine D'Beast. One of the city's best recurring Afrobeat parties. Great energy, full bar, and a fun lively crowd. Perfect for couples who love to dance and discover new music.

title: Jazz in the Sky – Atlanta Jazz Festival
description: Jazz on an elevated helipad with breathtaking views of the Atlanta skyline. Part of the Atlanta Jazz Festival — intimate setting, great music, unbeatable views. Check site for May Tuesday dates and book fast.

title: Friday Jazz – High Museum of Art
location: High Museum of Art, 1280 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta, GA
description: Live jazz at Atlanta's premier art museum. Features Rafael Pereira and friends this month. Grab a drink, wander the galleries together, then enjoy jazz in a stunning setting. Sophisticated couples date with art and live music.

title: Soil Festival 2026 – Food Well Alliance
description: Atlanta's premier urban agriculture event celebrating local food, farming, and community. Family-friendly with food vendors, workshops, and activities. Great for couples who care about sustainable food and local culture. Check website for exact date and location.

title: Vegan Soul Sunday – Weekly Community Event
description: Weekly Sunday vegan soul food gathering. Great community vibe, plant-based soul food, and community connection. Perfect for couples exploring vegan eating or who love good food and cultural events. Check Eventnoire for location and details.

title: Stormwater Studios – May Exhibitions & Events
description: Atlanta's community art gallery featuring rotating exhibitions and events. May includes 'Draw, Paint, and Connect' group sessions. A calm, inspiring date — wander the galleries together, talk about the art, grab coffee nearby. Check stormwaterstudios.org for full May schedule.

title: Gordon Parks: The South in Color – Jackson Fine Art
location: Jackson Fine Art, 3115 Piedmont Rd NE, Atlanta, GA 30305
description: Acclaimed color photography by Gordon Parks capturing the American South. A powerful, moving exhibition. Couples who appreciate photography, history, and Black American culture will find this deeply resonant. Call ahead to confirm hours.

title: Once the Ocean Floor – Haines Gallery
description: Group photography exhibition exploring ocean floor imagery across different photographic processes. Atmospheric, beautiful, and thought-provoking. Great low-key cultural date for couples who love visual art and quiet gallery spaces.

title: Brendan Sagalow – Live at Helium Comedy Club
location: Helium Comedy Club, 1157 Euclid Ave NE, Atlanta, GA 30307
description: Brendan Sagalow brings his acclaimed stand-up to Atlanta's top comedy club. Helium has an intimate vibe, great sightlines, food and drinks. Perfect for a funny, relaxed date night — shows May 22-24.

title: Atlanta Contemporary – May Events & Exhibitions
location: Atlanta Contemporary, 925 Marietta St NW, Atlanta, GA 30318
description: Atlanta's leading contemporary art space with rotating exhibitions and events. Always free, always interesting. Perfect for couples who love art and want an inspiring, low-key afternoon. Check website for specific May events.
